name: Kambi Group plc
summary: Kambi Group plc operates as a business-to-business supplier of managed sports betting services to business-to-consumer gaming operators in Europe, the Americas, and internationally. It offers services, including compliance, odds-compiling, customer intelligence, and risk management services built on an in-house developed software platform. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Ta' Xbiex, Malta.
